summary: Iteration 13 (Accounts Receivable) end-to-end verified. Backend: 19/19 pytest passed covering invoice persistence (file_b64 + computed totals + 45-day due_date + X-Invoice-Id header), listing/status/client filters, /api/invoices/overdue (freshly-created 45-day invoice correctly excluded), /api/invoices/{id} with payments+grns attached and /file streaming a valid PDF, GRN creation with short/rejected lines (GRN-2026-NNNN no, aggregates total_dispatched/received/accepted/rejected), Payment FIFO allocation - partial -> status='partial' and outstanding reduces, over-payment -> advance_amount=surplus and status='paid', Clients aggregate roll-up, and Tally-style Client Ledger with Invoice(Dr)/Payment(Cr)/GR-Adj entries plus aging buckets [0-30,31-60,61-90,90+] and totals. Regression smoke on /pos /workers /dashboard/overdue /production/archive /packing-templates /reports/payroll /reports/monthly-production /packing-lists all 200. Frontend: /invoices renders 5 tiles (tile-all/pending/partial/overdue/paid), 16 invoice rows; invoice-modal opens; GRN dialog opens with grn-recv-0/grn-rej-0/grn-submit; Payment dialog opens with pay-amount prefilled to outstanding (20160), pay-mode/pay-date/pay-ref/pay-bank/pay-submit all visible. /clients renders rows, open-ledger triggers ledger-modal showing aging-0-30/aging-31-60/aging-61-90/aging-90plus + ledger-entries with 11 entries (running Dr/Cr balance) + close button. Dashboard banner correctly absent when no overdue invoices exist (verified status=='overdue' filter empty).
passed: POST /api/invoices/job persists file_b64 + subtotal/cgst_amount/sgst_amount/igst_amount/grand_total + due_date(=invoice_date+45d) and returns X-Invoice-Id header
GET /api/invoices returns decorated rows (status, outstanding, received_amount, days_to_due); filters ?status=pending and ?client=<name> work
GET /api/invoices/{id} returns invoice with payments[] + grns[] attached
GET /api/invoices/{id}/file streams a valid PDF (>1KB, content-type application/pdf)
POST /api/grns generates GRN-2026-XXXX, computes total_dispatched/received/accepted/rejected, attaches to invoice and visible in /api/grns?invoice_id=
POST /api/payments FIFO: partial -> status='partial' + outstanding reduces; over-payment -> advance_amount=surplus + status='paid'; payment_no=RCT-2026-XXXX
GET /api/clients aggregates invoice_count, total_invoiced, total_received, outstanding, overdue_*

GET /api/clients/{name}/ledger returns Tally entries (Invoice Dr, Payment Cr) with running balance + balance_type (Dr/Cr), closing_balance, aging buckets list [0-30,31-60,61-90,90+], totals, invoices[]
Frontend /invoices: all 5 tiles render with correct counts (Total 16, Pending 1, Partial 1, Overdue 0, Paid 14); search field present; pending filter shows 1 row

Frontend invoice-modal opens via inv-view-<no>; grn-dialog opens via inv-grn-<no> with grn-recv-0/grn-rej-0/grn-submit; payment-dialog opens via inv-payment-<no> with pay-amount prefilled to outstanding (20160) + all fields present
Frontend /clients renders 2 client rows; open-ledger-<name> opens ledger-modal with aging-0-30/31-60/61-90/90plus + 11 ledger-entries + ledger-close
Frontend Dashboard: overdue-invoices-banner correctly NOT shown when no invoices have status=='overdue' (expected behaviour)

issues: GRN dialog does not close on Escape key (only via Cancel button). Minor UX consistency issue - other modals (invoice-modal) also don't have ESC-to-close. Consider adding key handler.

action_items: (LOW/optional) Old invoices created before this iteration show as 'paid' with zero net_amount because they have no grand_total/due_date. Consider either back-filling via a one-shot script or hiding them in the listing with a 'legacy' flag. Acknowledged by main agent in handoff note - not blocking.
(LOW) Add ESC-key-to-close on modal dialogs (invoice-modal, grn-dialog, payment-dialog, ledger-modal) for UX consistency.
(MED tech-debt, same as iter12) server.py is now ~2985 lines - splitting into modules (invoices/grns/payments/clients) recommended.
(MED) invoice file_b64 stored inline in MongoDB doc; large PDFs could exceed 16MB doc limit. Consider GridFS or external storage.
critical_code_review_comments: FIFO allocation in /api/payments correctly sorts invoices by due_date then invoice_date - good.
_decorate_invoice safely handles legacy invoices with no grand_total (returns net_amount=0, status='paid'). Acceptable but pollutes 'Paid' tile with empty legacy rows.
GR Adjustment in ledger uses price_idx from line_items_snapshot - correctly multiplies short qty by unit_price.
advance_amount is recorded on the Payment doc but is not surfaced in any UI tile/list - consider showing client credit balance.
Cross-client merging is correctly rejected in /api/invoices/merged (regression-verified).
seed_data_creation: Created via backend tests: 1 fresh invoice (SSK26-27-017 from dispatched job), 1 GRN (GRN-2026-XXXX with first line rejected_qty=1), 2 payments (TEST_PART_001 partial NEFT + TEST_FULL_001 over-payment RTGS with ~100 surplus advance_amount). Final state: that invoice is fully paid. The pre-existing pending invoice SSK26-27-015 is still unpaid and used for frontend GRN/Payment dialog tests (no submit triggered so its state was preserved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13.py -v. The fresh_invoice fixture creates a new invoice each session from a dispatched archive row - it is session-scoped so re-running consumes more dispatched jobs and creates fresh invoice + GRN + 2 payments. Watch /api/production/archive: tests need at least one row with stage='dispatched'. Legacy invoices (created before this iteration) appear as status='paid' with zero amounts - this is expected and main agent has acknowledged it.
